displayName: Wire All Remaining Backend APIs to Frontend

decisions.decision: One service file per backend domain module
decisions.rationale: Matches existing authService.ts pattern. Each service exports typed functions calling apiRequest.
Already handles Bearer token injection, 401 refresh, and JSON envelope unwrapping. No reason to change.

decisions.decision: Cursor-based pagination via useAuthenticatedApi for all list endpoints
decisions.rationale: Backend uses CursorPage<T> consistently. Members page already demonstrates this pattern.

decisions.decision: TypeScript interfaces per service file matching backend DTOs
decisions.rationale: Keep response types co-located with the service that fetches them. Import types where needed in pages.

decisions.decision: Local React state (useState/useEffect), no global state library
decisions.rationale: App complexity doesn't warrant Redux/Zustand. Each page manages its own data lifecycle.

decisions.decision: Use existing ApiError class, add loading/error states to each page
decisions.rationale: Consistent with Members page pattern. Show inline error messages and loading spinners.
Pure fetch via apiClient.ts is sufficient. No need for axios, react-query, or swr.

decisions.decision: Replace mock data page-by-page, remove mock.ts imports as each page is wired
decisions.rationale: Incremental approach — each page can be tested independently as it switches to real API.

constraints: Backend runs on localhost:8080, Vite proxy already configured for /api
All list endpoints use cursor-based pagination (CursorPage<T>)
All responses wrapped in ApiResponse<T> envelope with { success, data, message }
Auth: Bearer JWT tokens with auto-refresh on 401
Role-based access: some endpoints require ADMIN or TREASURER roles
